_doc: Per-flavor metadata. fallbackId points to the built-in VS 2026 base theme (Light or Dark) that this theme inherits all non-overridden tokens from. GUIDs from docs: Light = {de3dbbcd-f642-433c-8353-8f1df4370aba}, Dark = {1ded0138-47ce-435e-84ef-9ec1f439b749}. extraRoles defines per-flavor palette additions: accentFg = readable text color drawn ON TOP of the green accent (dark text for bright greens, light text for dark greens).
name: XBOX Series X
